name: quickdesign
description: QuickDesign CLI plugin marketplace — AI media generation skill (UGC video, image edit, video upscale) backed by the npm-distributed `quickdesign` binary.

plugins.name: quickdesign
plugins.description: AI media generation skill: Seedance 2.0 R2V, Sora 2, Kling, Nano Banana 2, Topaz upscale. Multi-segment UGC pipeline with voice continuity. Includes per-model reference cards, model-agnostic concept docs, and the canonical talking-avatar workflow.
